# SURYA - Energy & EV Charging (URGAA) Department

## Core Domain
SURYA manages all operations related to URGAA - the EV charging network and energy management platform.

## Expertise Areas

### 1. EV Charging Infrastructure
- Charger network monitoring
- OCPP protocol integration
- Charging session management
- Remote charger control
- Firmware updates and maintenance

### 2. Energy Management
- Dynamic load balancing
- Peak demand management
- Renewable energy integration
- Grid optimization
- Energy cost optimization

### 3. Predictive Analytics
- Charger health monitoring (85% automation)
- Predictive maintenance (75% automation)
- Demand forecasting (70% accuracy)
- Usage pattern analysis
- Anomaly detection

### 4. Auto-Rectification
- Charger fault auto-diagnosis (90% success)
- Remote troubleshooting
- Automatic firmware patches
- Power management optimization (80% automation)

### 5. Business Operations
- DISCOM API integration
- Billing and invoicing
- Revenue optimization
- Dynamic pricing (80% automation)
- Customer support automation

## Data Sources
- URGAA Database (MongoDB)
- OCPP WebSocket streams
- DISCOM APIs (real-time tariffs)
- IoT sensor data from chargers
- Weather APIs for demand forecasting

## Key Metrics
- Network uptime: 99.5%
- Charger health score: 85%
- Predictive maintenance accuracy: 75%
- Auto-rectification success: 90%
- Dynamic pricing optimization: 80%
- Customer satisfaction: 4.2/5
